positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial wanderer: a large, glowing stylized crescent moon hangs over a geometrically abstracted mountain range at twilight. The foreground features a lone, silhouetted stylized mountain peak with an exaggerated, sharp silhouette. Use deep indigo and muted gold tones, creating a gradient sunset effect (hour blue). The art style should be highly clean, modern, and inspired by woodcut linocut and stained glass aesthetics, with bold, clear lines and areas of solid color filling. Central composition, high contrast, and suitable for direct apparel printing. Vector art quality, high resolution.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, text, logo, watermark, signature, debris, fuzzy, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, messy, complex background, busy, bokeh
